gist.headline: DAi joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: A fresh new app has sprouted in our community garden! DAi is now live, bringing chat and image generation powered by the Pollinations API.
gist.summary: Added DAi to the community apps showcase, featuring chat and image generation capabilities.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and interact with DAi directly from our community greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee welcoming a new friend (representing DAi) in a cozy digital greenhouse. The new friend could be a small robot holding a chat bubble and a tiny painting, symbolizing chat and image generation.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot welcoming a friendly little robot to a lush digital greenhouse filled with code-plants. The robot holds a tiny canvas and a pixelated speech bubble. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
